title: Croydex Rubagrip Bath Mat Non Slip Anti Mould for Inside Bath - Slip Resistant with Secure Grip Suction Cups, Easy to Clean, Made from Natural Rubber, Anti-Bacterial Hygiene 'N' Clean (Medium)
features: NON SLIP SUCTION CUPS - This non slip bath mat ensures safety with its secure grip suction cups, providing stability and peace of mind in the bathroom.
ANTI-BACTERIAL - Our bathmats feature anti-bacterial and anti-mould protection with our Hygiene 'n' Clean additive. Easy to wipe clean, great for maintaining a hygienic bathroom space.
LONG DESIGN - The long bath mat is designed to cover a larger surface area, providing better coverage for your tub.
NATURAL RUBBER - Crafted from durable natural rubber, this rubber bath mat offers longevity and effectiveness. Please note, this product is not be suitable for latex allergy sufferers.
VERSATILE - Suitable for various bathroom styles, this white bath mat serves as an ideal addition to any bathroom.
